TextView.android:text: Tap anywhere to enable renderer settings
VinzzRenderer is a renderer plugin that aims to optimized mobile cpu/gpu especially snapdragon to get more fps
Recommended ON. Removes disjoint timer query overhead.
Advanced DSA OpenGL extension. Default OFF.
Upscaling filter. Use with ANGLE for correct rendering.
Max FPS mode. Device may run warm.
GL_FASTEST for all driver hint targets.
Unnecessary on Adreno. Saves shader cycles.
Discard draw calls with fewer than 6 vertices.
Optimize multi-draw indirect for Sodium chunks.
Reuse GPU sync objects. Reduce allocations.
Save GPU query overhead on Adreno.
Aggressive discard. May cause frame glitches.
Map vertex buffers persistently in GPU memory.
Detect and reuse unchanged index buffers.
Skip redundant texture binds per frame.
Use native Adreno ASTC textures when available.
Negative = sharper textures | Positive = blurrier | Default: -0.5
Cache more variants for faster shader reload.
Faster math. May cause visual artifacts.
Faster but less accurate fragment output.
Adreno 650 hierarchical Z cull. Boosts FPS.
Removes TBDR tile sync overhead. Fast.
May cause color artifacts. Default OFF.
Enable VulkanMod. Auto-disables Sodium Mode. Writes JVM args.
Fix NoSuchFieldError: sun.misc.Unsafe crash on Android.
GPU memory compaction via Vulkan Memory Allocator.
GL_EXT_buffer_storage persistent map. No per-frame vertex re-upload.
Sort draw calls by shader+texture. Reduce GPU state switches.
A-Trous wavelet post-process. Remove SSAO/volumetric/shadow noise.
GL_KHR_parallel_shader_compile. No blocking on shader load.
Save shader binary to /sdcard/MG/pipeline_cache/. Instant reload.
Skip heavy inject for complex shaders.
Never modify compute shaders. Fixes Iris deferred errors.
